# Adrián Navarro - Full AI/LLM Engineer Portfolio & CV

This document provides a comprehensive overview of Adrián Navarro's professional background, technical expertise, and key achievements as an AI and LLM Engineer.

## Professional Profile
Adrián is a specialized AI Engineer focusing on Generative AI, Multi-Agent Systems, and Large Language Models. He excels in leading end-to-end AI initiatives, from architectural design to production deployment, with a strong emphasis on remote excellence and performance optimization.

## Core Technical Skills
- **AI/LLM:** LangChain, LangSmith, Fine-tuning, Ragas, Prompt Engineering, Gemini, Anthropic, OpenAI, AI Guardrails.
- **RAG Architecture:** Vector Databases (Elasticsearch, Pinecone), Embedding Optimization, Semantic Search.
- **Data Science:** Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NumPy, Pandas, Big Data (Hadoop).
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS (CDK), Microsoft Azure, GCP (Certified), GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code.
- **Mathematics:** BSc in Mathematical Engineering in Data Science (#1 in class).

## Work Experience

### Minsait (Indra Group) | AI Engineer & NLP Specialist
*June 2024 – Present*
- Leading 3+ AI initiatives from POC to production.
- Owner of critical RAG pipeline decisions.
- Achieved an 80% reduction in processing latency.
- Standardized model validation protocols using Ragas metrics.

### Hiberus (Grupo Henneo) | ML & AI Engineer
*June 2023 – Sept 2023*
- Developed CV algorithms using PyTorch.
- Prototyped LLM workflows on Azure.

## Key Projects & Achievements
- **KDD24 Researcher:** Presented a research paper on "Summarization of Large Text Volumes Using LLMs" at the ACM KDD24 Congress.
- **Fine-tuning Expert:** Fine-tuned a GRPO reasoning model for complex integral resolution, achieving a 94% improvement.
- **HackEPS 2024 Winner:** Innovation Award for a project integrating VR and AI agents.
- **Certified Professional:** GCP Professional Data Engineer.

## Full CV (Raw Content)
### EDUCATION
- BSc in Mathematical Engineering in Data Science | UPF
- Academic Rank: #1 in class.
- Honors: Linear Algebra, Algorithm Design, Visual Analytics, and Project Management.
